rationale: Gov't Code §2001.001 states the APA's general purpose—uniform agency practice, public participation, and judicial review. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote:
It is the public policy of the state through this chapter to:
(1) provide minimum standards of uniform practice and procedure for state agencies;
(2) provide for public participation in the rulemaking process; and
(3) restate the law of judicial review of state agency action.
_note: Rule text is a general-purpose provision of the Administrative Procedure Act; it has no operative bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
